signals.headline: Fed Holds Rates Steady at March 18, 2026 FOMC Meeting, Projects Single Cut for 2026 Amid Elevated Inflation and Solid GD
signals.raw:
Fed Holds Rates Steady at March 18, 2026 FOMC Meeting, Projects Single Cut for 2026 Amid Elevated Inflation and Solid GDP Growth | NO** | HIGH confidence[4][5]

The Federal Reserve's FOMC statement on March 18, 2026, confirmed no rate change, keeping the federal funds rate at 3.5-3.75%, with economic activity expanding solidly, low job gains, stable unemployment, and somewhat elevated inflation[5]

signals.headline: No Whale Bets or X Chatter Confirmed in Live Data | NO | HIGH confidence**
signals.raw:
No Whale Bets or X Chatter Confirmed in Live Data | NO | HIGH confidence**  
Search results highlight 130+ tweet markets and 100+ news stories but provide no breaking X posts from traders on whales, tips, or movements; XTracker exists for analytics without specifics.[2][3][5] Data is dated (up to April 19) with no real-time "right now" confirmations as of 8 AM UTC.[1][4]
